# terrible_cisco_mso_ndo_ipsla_track_list (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The description of the IPSLA Track List.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ipsla_track_list` (String) The name of the IPSLA Track List.
- `ipsla_track_list_uuid` (String) The UUID of the IPSLA Track List. This parameter is required when the `ipsla_track_list` attribute needs to be updated.
- `members` (String) The IPSLA Track List members. Providing a new list of `members` will replace the existing members from the IPSLA Track List. Providing an empty list will remove the `members=[]` from the IPSLA Track List.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Use `absent` for removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects. Use `present` for creating or updating.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `template` (String) The name of the template. The template must be a tenant template. This parameter or `template_id` is required.
- `template_id` (String) The ID of the template. The template must be a tenant template. This parameter or `template` is required.
- `threshold_down` (Number) The IPSLA Track List percentage or weight down threshold. The value must be in the range 0 - 100 when `type=percentage`. The value must be in the range 0 - 255 when `type=weight`. The value must be less than or equal to `threshold_up`. The default value is 0.
- `threshold_up` (Number) The IPSLA Track List percentage or weight up threshold. The value must be in the range 0 - 100 when `type=percentage`. The value must be in the range 0 - 255 when `type=weight`. The value must be greater than or equal to `threshold_down`. The default value is 1.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type` (String) The IPSLA Track List type used for determining up or down status. This parameter is required when creating the IPSLA Track List.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
